selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

response_raw: {"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","opinion":"Fake content on social media can be harmful, but there are ways to identify and manage it. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: Fake content on social media can be harmful, but there are ways to identify and manage it. Here are some steps you can take: 1. Be aware of the sources of fake content, such as bots and trolls, who may have hidden motives. 2. Use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the accuracy of information before sharing it. 3. Report suspicious or false content to the platform or account responsible for it. 4. Practice critical thinking and media literacy when consuming information online. 5. Support organizations that promote fact-based journalism and help combat misinformation. By taking these steps, you can help protect yourself and others from the harmful effects of fake content on social media.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: 1. Be aware of sources of fake content. 2. Use fact-checking tools to verify accuracy. 3. Report suspicious or false content. 4. Practice critical thinking and media literacy. 5. Support organizations that promote fact-based journalism.
